---
id: play-vrma-animation
title: "Play a VRMA animation"
description: "Start playing a VRMA animation on the specified VRM entity. The asset field identifies which animation to play."
sidebar_label: "Play a VRMA animation"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/reference/api/homunculus-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Play a VRMA animation"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/vrm/{entity_id}/vrma/play"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Start playing a VRMA animation on the specified VRM entity. The asset field identifies which animation to play.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
